description_long: This is a tall, slender tube of lotion with a predominantly white body and a wide yellow band near the base. The front features colorful floral graphics in purple, green, and yellow, along with printed text including a brand and product name. The tube is made of flexible plastic and is capped with a translucent, likely screw-on cap at the bottom. The back side displays product information and additional text in a smaller font, with more subtle floral graphics. The overall design is vibrant and modern, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The tube is designed to be squeezed to dispense the lotion inside.
description: A tall, white and yellow floral-patterned lotion tube with a translucent cap and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing colorful floral graphics, brand, and product name on a white and yellow tube.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tube's slim profile and partial floral graphics wrapping around the body.
description_view_2: Back view displaying product information text and subtle floral graphics on a mostly white background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible floral patterns and the yellow band wrapping around the base.
